parameters.text:
=Analyze this resume and provide a hiring score out of 100: {{ $json.final_resume_text }}
Email: {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.email }}

options.systemMessage:
=### ROLE
You are a strict "Senior Engineering Manager" hiring for an AI & Automation Specialist - Learning & Design team. You have 200+ applicants. Your job is to filter aggressively. Only the top 20% should score above 60. Most candidates should score between 20–50.

### SCORING GUIDELINES (Total 100)

**1. Technical Proficiency (0–40 points)**
- 35–40: Hands-on Python/JS/n8n/automation with real deployed projects
- 25–34: Strong backend (Java/Go/C++) OR one AI/automation tool with projects
- 15–24: Some coding experience, no automation, mostly academic projects
- 5–14: Basic coding only, no real projects, purely theoretical knowledge
- 0–4: No technical evidence whatsoever

**2. Communication & Design Sense (0–30 points)**
- 25–30: Content creation, teaching, UI/UX, public speaking WITH evidence
- 18–24: Technical writing, leadership, well-structured resume with clear impact
- 10–17: Average resume structure, some soft skill mentions but no evidence
- 3–9: Poorly structured resume, vague descriptions, no communication evidence
- 0–2: Incomprehensible or completely unstructured

**3. Builder Mindset (0–30 points)**
- 25–30: Multiple shipped projects solving real problems, freelance work, or hackathon wins
- 18–24: 1–2 completed side projects with clear outcomes
- 10–17: Academic/course projects only, no independent building
- 3–9: Mentioned projects but no details, no links, no outcomes
- 0–2: No projects whatsoever

### SCORE DISTRIBUTION RULES — FOLLOW STRICTLY
- 75–100 → "Interview" — Exceptional candidate, rare, max 15% of applicants
- 45–74  → "Review"   — Shows potential but needs human judgment
- 0–44   → "Reject"   — Does not meet minimum bar for this role

### STRICT RULES
- Do NOT be generous. A candidate with only college projects and no automation experience should score 20–35.
- Do NOT give above 60 unless you see real shipped work with measurable impact.
- Do NOT round up scores. If unsure between 44 and 45, choose 44.
- A clean resume alone does NOT earn communication points without evidence.
- Transferable skills are valid BUT only if the candidate has demonstrated them in real projects.

### MANDATORY OUTPUT FORMAT
Return ONLY a valid JSON object. No markdown.
{
  "candidate_name": "Full Name",
  "candidate_email": "Email Address (or null)",
  "hiring_score": (Integer 0-100),
  "recommendation": "Strictly choose one value: 'Interview' OR 'Review' OR 'Reject'",
  "key_insights": [
    "Insight 1 (Top Technical Strength)",
    "Insight 2 (Communication/Soft Skill)",
    "Insight 3 (Gap or Area for Growth)"
  ],
  "email_feedback": "If score is below 45 (Reject), write a helpful 2-sentence explanation. FIRST sentence: Compliment a specific strength. SECOND sentence: Explain the exact gap. NEVER mention the score."
}

You are a strict "Senior Engineering Manager" hiring for an AI & Automation Specialist - Learning & Design team. You have 200+ applicants. Your job is to filter aggressively. Only the top 20% should score above 60. Most candidates should score between 20–50.

parameters.text:
=You are an advanced Resume OCR & Parsing System. Your ONLY job is to extract 100% of the text from this resume image into clean Markdown. Do NOT score, evaluate, or summarize anything.

**CRITICAL EXTRACTION RULES:**

1. **Capture Everything:** Transcribe every single word — headers, footers, sidebars, small captions, dates, percentages, URLs. Nothing gets skipped or summarized.

2. **Handle Layouts Smartly:** If the resume has a 2-column layout (Skills on left, Experience on right), process each column as a separate logical section. Never mix lines from different columns.

3. **Preserve These Exactly:**
   - Tool names: n8n, Python, JavaScript, API, LLM, GPT, etc. — no spelling correction
   - URLs: GitHub, LinkedIn, Portfolio links — copy character by character
   - Metrics: "increased sales by 40%", "10,000 users", "3 years" — preserve all numbers
   - Project names and descriptions — these are critical, do not shorten

4. **OCR Error Correction:** Fix obvious scan errors contextually only for garbled words (e.g., "Pyth0n" → "Python", "JavaScrlpt" → "JavaScript"). Do not change anything else.

5. **Sections to prioritize:** Projects, Work Experience, Skills, Certifications, GitHub/Portfolio links. These carry the most weight in downstream evaluation.

**OUTPUT FORMAT:**
Return the full resume content in clean Markdown with proper section headers (##). Do not add any commentary, scores, or opinions. Raw extracted text only.

parameters.subject: =Interview Candidate
parameters.message:
= HireFlow - Candidate Selected for Interview

HIREFLOW

Applicant Tracking System

 ✓ Interview Scheduled

🏆

New Candidate Selected!

A candidate has been shortlisted and invited for interview

Hi HR Team, 👋
The AI pipeline has shortlisted the following candidate for the AI & Automation Specialist – Learning & Design role. An interview invitation has already been sent to them automatically.

👤   Candidate Profile

Contact Information

AI Hiring Score

{{ $('All profile & sort profiles').item.json.Insights }}

Resume

📄   View Full Resume on Google Drive →

What happens next:

→ Candidate has received an automated interview invitation email
→ They'll book a slot via Calendly — check your calendar for the booking
→ Review their resume above before the scheduled interview
📊

Full Candidate Tracker

Open Interview Candidates Sheet →

Best regards,

HireFlow ATS — Automated Pipeline

parameters.subject: HIREFLOW_ATS
parameters.message:
= HireFlow - Application Under Review
HIREFLOW
Applicant Tracking System 		⏳ Under Review
🔍
Your Application is Being Reviewed
We've received your resume and our team is carefully going through it.
We'll be in touch with an update very soon.

Hi {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }},

Thank you for applying to HireFlow. We've successfully received your application and resume, and it's currently being reviewed by our hiring team.

📋  Application Status
Applicant
{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}
Current Status
⏳  Under Review
Expected Response
Within 3–5 business days
What happens next?

✦  Our hiring team will evaluate your profile against the role requirements
✦  You will receive a follow-up email with the final decision
✦  If shortlisted, we'll reach out to schedule an interview
✦  No need to reapply — your application is already in our system

We appreciate your patience and interest in joining our team. Every application is reviewed thoroughly — good things take a little time. 🙌

Best regards,

The HireFlow Hiring Team

HR Department · HireFlow ATS
HIREFLOW
© 2026 HireFlow Systems. All rights reserved.
Don't reply to this email

parameters.subject: review candidate
parameters.message:
= HireFlow - Candidate Review Decision
HIREFLOW
Applicant Tracking System 		⏳ Decision Required
🧠
Review Candidate — Your Call
This candidate scored in the review range. AI couldn't make a confident decision.
Please review their profile and choose the next step.

Hi Swaraj, a candidate has landed in the Review bucket — meaning the AI scoring system wasn't confident enough to auto-decide. Your human judgment is needed.

👤  Candidate Profile
Contact Information
{{ $('All profile & sort profiles').item.json.Contact_Info }}
AI Hiring Score
{{ $('All profile & sort profiles').item.json.Hiring_Score }} / 100   ⚠ Review Zone
AI Key Insights
{{ $('All profile & sort profiles').item.json.Insights }}
Resume

📄  View Resume on Google Drive →
📊    View Review Candidates Sheet →
✅  Approve
Candidate moves forward — an Interview Invitation email will be sent to them automatically.
❌  Dis-Approved
Candidate is rejected — a Rejection email will be sent to them automatically.

Best regards,

HireFlow ATS — Automated Pipeline

HR Department · HireFlow ATS
HIREFLOW
© 2026 HireFlow Systems. All rights reserved.
Don't reply to this email

nodes.name: Send message and wait for response

parameters.subject: HIREFLOW_ATS
parameters.message:
= HireFlow - Application Update

HIREFLOW

Applicant Tracking System

 Application Update

📬

Thank You for Applying

We appreciate your time and interest in HireFlow

Hi {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}, 👋

Thank you for giving us the opportunity to review your application for the AI & Automation Specialist – Learning & Design role at HireFlow.

We truly appreciate the time and effort you put into sharing your background with us. After careful consideration, we've decided not to move forward with your application at this time.

📝   Feedback from our Review Team

"{{ $('All profile & sort profiles').item.json.Feedback }}"

What you can do next:

→ Build projects using Python, n8n, or AI automation tools
→ Strengthen the areas mentioned in the feedback above
→ Apply again in the future — we'd love to reconsider!
💡 This decision is specific to our current needs for this role. Please don't be discouraged — growth is a journey, and we genuinely wish you the very best in it.

We wish you every success in your job search and future professional endeavors.

Keep building. Keep growing. 🌱

Best regards,

The HireFlow Recruiting Team

HR Department · HireFlow ATS

HIREFLOW

© 2026 HireFlow Systems. All rights reserved.

Don't reply to this email

= HireFlow - Interview Invitation

HIREFLOW

Applicant Tracking System

 ✓ Selected

🎉

You're Moving Forward!

We'd love to invite you for an interview

Hi {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}, 👋

Thank you for applying for the AI & Automation Specialist – Learning & Design role at HireFlow.

After carefully reviewing your application, we're excited to let you know that your profile stood out — and we'd love to get to know you better in a 1-on-1 conversation.

📋

Application Status

Recommended for Interview ✓

What to expect in the interview:

→ A short intro chat about your background & projects
→ Discussion on AI automation workflows & your approach
→ A chance for you to ask us anything about the role
📅   Book Your Interview Slot

Pick a time that works best for you via Calendly

We're looking forward to connecting with you. If you have any questions before then, feel free to reply to this email.

See you soon! 🚀

Best regards,

The HireFlow Recruiting Team

HIREFLOW

© 2026 HireFlow Systems. All rights reserved.
